autoFill.description: Whether to duplicate content to fill the container.

complete.description: Emits when a finite marquee animation completes.

defaultPaused.description: The initial pause state when uncontrolled.

delay.description: The delay before the animation starts, in seconds.

id.description: The unique identifier of the marquee.

ids.type: Partial<{ root: string; viewport: string; content: (index: number) => string }>
ids.description: The ids of the marquee elements. Useful for composition.

loopComplete.description: Emits when the marquee completes one loop iteration.

loopCount.description: The number of animation loops. Use 0 for infinite looping.

pauseDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the pause state changes.

pauseOnInteraction.description: Whether to pause the marquee on hover or focus.

reverse.description: Whether to reverse the animation direction.

side.description: The side the marquee scrolls towards.

speed.description: The animation speed in pixels per second.

value.description: The marquee machine returned by useMarquee().

index.description: The content copy index. Use 0 for the original content.

side.description: The side where the edge gradient should appear.
